description:
Add a new CPT procedure code to FreeMED's billing code management system with the following details:

- CPT Code: 99214
- Internal Name: Office outpatient visit est moderate MDM
- External Name: Office or other outpatient visit for the evaluation and management of an established patient requiring moderate medical decision making
- Gender Restriction: No gender restriction (applies to all patients)
- Taxed: No (not taxed)

metadata.data_source: Standard AMA CPT code for Evaluation and Management
